title: JEE Advanced Registration
description: Register and appear for JEE Advanced after qualifying JEE Main.

title: JoSAA Counselling
description: Participate in Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) counselling based on rank.

title: Choice Filling
description: Fill institute and program preferences in order of priority.

title: Seat Allotment
description: Seats are allotted based on rank, category, and choices.

title: Document Verification
description: Submit required documents online and report to institute for verification.

title: Fee Payment & Enrollment
description: Pay semester fees and complete enrollment formalities.

title: JEE Advanced Qualification
description: Must clear JEE Main first then qualify JEE Advanced.

title: JoSAA Counselling Registration
description: Register on JoSAA portal within the specified dates.

title: Fill Program Choices
description: Fill choices of institutes and programs in preferred order.

title: Seat Allotment Result
description: Check seat allotment based on rank and preferences.

title: Online Document Verification
description: Upload all required documents for online verification.

title: Report to Institute
description: Physically report to IIT Delhi for final admission.

title: Qualify Entrance Exam
description: Clear JEE Advanced (BS Research) or GATE/CSIR-NET (PG/PhD).

title: Apply Online
description: Fill the online application form at iisc.ac.in with all required details.

title: Merit List & Interview
description: Shortlisted candidates are called for written test/interview (for Ph.D).

title: Admission Offer
description: Admission offers sent to selected candidates.

title: Fee Payment
description: Confirm admission by paying the first semester fees online.

title: BITSAT Registration
description: Register for BITSAT on the official BITS Pilani website.

title: Appear for BITSAT
description: Take the computer-based BITSAT test at authorized centers.

title: Apply for Admission
description: Fill the admission application form with BITSAT score and preferences.

title: Iteration Process
description: Participate in the merit-based iterative admission process.

title: Fee Payment
description: Pay the admission and semester fees online.

title: Reporting
description: Report to the campus with original documents.

title: JEE Main
description: Qualify JEE Main and register for JoSAA counselling.

title: JoSAA/CSAB Counselling
description: Fill NIT preferences in JoSAA or CSAB (Special Round).

title: Seat Allotment
description: Accept allotted seat and pay seat acceptance fee.

title: Reporting
description: Report to NIT Trichy with original documents.

title: VITEEE Registration
description: Register for VITEEE online at vit.ac.in from November onwards.

title: VITEEE Exam
description: Appear for VITEEE computer-based test at authorized centers.

title: Counselling
description: Participate in online or offline counselling based on VITEEE rank.

title: Program Selection
description: Choose program based on rank and seat availability.

title: Fee Payment & Reporting
description: Pay fees and report to campus with documents.

title: NEET-UG Qualification
description: Appear and qualify NEET-UG conducted by NTA.

title: MCC Counselling
description: Register for MCC (Medical Counselling Committee) counselling.

title: Choice Filling
description: Fill AIIMS-specific seats in preference order.

title: Seat Allotment
description: Seat allotted based on NEET rank and choices.

title: Reporting & Document Verification
description: Report to AIIMS Delhi with original documents.

title: CAT Registration
description: Register and appear for CAT. Aim for 99+ percentile for a realistic chance.

title: IIMA Application
description: Apply on IIMA website with academic records, work experience, essays.

title: Shortlisting
description: Shortlisted based on CAT percentile, academics, and work experience.

title: WAT-PI Process
description: Written Ability Test followed by rigorous Personal Interview at IIM Ahmedabad.

title: Final Merit List
description: Final admission based on composite score of CAT, WAT-PI, academics, and work experience.
